name: Symbiosis Institute of Digital and Telecom Management Pune
aka: Symbiosis Institute of Digital and Telecom Management, Pune
address: Symbiosis Knowledge City, Lavale, Pune – 412115, Maharashtra, India

courses.name: MBA in Digital and Telecom Management

scholarships.name: Merit-Based Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Top 10 students based on first-semester performance (MBA)

scholarships.name: International Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Foreign Nationals/NRIs with high academic merit

scholarships.name: University Sports Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Represented the state/national level in sports

scholarships.name: SIU Alumni Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Children of SIU alumni admitted to SIDTM

scholarships.name: Late Jayatee Deshmukh Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Girl students securing the highest score in SNAP & admitted to SIDTM
